summary: Awful audience‑recorded tape, but the Playin' > Uncle John’s > Playin' sequence is praised as a highlight.
review: The consensus among reviewers is that this AUD source is virtually unlistenable – it’s crowd‑heavy, muffled and described as “horrid audience” recording. Aside from the technical disaster, one fan points out that the Playin'>Uncle John's>Playin' suite is a standout moment worth hearing if a better source surfaces.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are negative, focusing on poor audio quality; only one modest positive comment about a specific song segment, yielding an overall rating just above the lowest tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Extremely crowd‑heavy, muffled, and generally described as awful; listeners request a soundboard (SBD) source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on overall set pacing; only the aforementioned suite is mentioned positively.
